hero.title: Share Your Expertise
hero.subtitle: We publish in-depth, practitioner-written articles on web development, SEO, PPC, and digital marketing. If you have real experience and actionable insights, we want to hear from you.

whyWrite.title: Why Write for Innovayse?
whyWrite.subtitle: Real benefits for contributors who meet our editorial standards

items.title: Do-Follow Author Bio Link
items.desc: Every accepted article includes a do-follow link in your author bio to your website or LinkedIn profile.

items.title: Reach 12,000+ Monthly Readers
items.desc: Our audience is decision-makers: business owners, marketing managers, and developers actively seeking solutions.

items.title: Published in 3 Languages
items.desc: Accepted articles are published in English, Russian, and Armenian — expanding your reach across the CIS market.

items.title: Social Media Promotion
items.desc: We share every accepted article across our LinkedIn, Twitter, and Telegram channels with your attribution.

topics.title: Topics We Accept
topics.subtitle: We prioritize original, experience-backed content in these areas

guidelines.title: Editorial Guidelines
guidelines.subtitle: What we require from every submitted article

items.title: 1,500+ word minimum
items.desc: We only publish comprehensive, in-depth articles. Listicles and thin content are rejected.

items.title: Original, first-person experience
items.desc: Share real case studies, project outcomes, or learnings. We verify all factual claims.

items.title: No self-promotional links in body
items.desc: One do-follow link in your author bio. No product/service links within the article body.

items.title: Original images or diagrams
items.desc: Include at least 2 original screenshots, diagrams, or data visualizations.

items.title: Not published elsewhere
items.desc: We only accept 100% original content not published or submitted elsewhere.

items.title: Timely, 2025-relevant content
items.desc: Content must be current. No recycled posts from 2020-2022 with a new title.

steps.title: Submit Your Pitch
steps.desc: Send us a 200-word pitch with your proposed title, key points, and a brief author bio via the form below. No need to write the full article first.

steps.title: Editorial Review (5–7 days)
steps.desc: Our editorial team reviews your pitch for topic fit, originality, and audience relevance. You'll receive a decision within 5–7 business days.

steps.title: Write & Submit Draft
steps.desc: If approved, write your full article following our style guide. Submit the draft as a Google Doc with editing access enabled.

steps.title: Review & Publication
steps.desc: We review for accuracy, style, and SEO optimization. Minor edits are made collaboratively. Publication typically within 2–3 weeks of draft submission.

form.title: Submit Your Pitch
form.subtitle: Tell us about your article idea. We respond to every submission.
form.note: Please include 'Guest Post Pitch:' in your message subject line.

notAccepted.title: We Do Not Accept
items: AI-generated content (we verify with detection tools)
Content previously published on any platform
Articles promoting specific tools or products without disclosure
Content outside our defined topic areas
